title: Blood Blade
description: Mod adds Blood Blade of Mrk'grsh'traklar from the LetsPlay of YouTuber Lololoshka
body:
this is the blade of the legendary character Mrk'grsh'traklar from the minecraft series "Heart of the Universe" recorded by YouTuber Lololoshka

The mod itself adds:
-4 crafts
-1 3d blood blade
-1 3d blade for a blade
-1 1 blade handle
-1 gray leather

Mod has no dependencies. Everything in it and how it is done is shown in the photo

Sword abillity:
When a sword is used to damage a mob, the sword owner regains his health
Sword abilities only work on the latest version of the mod
